title: genista florida subsp. polygaliphylla
intro: Genista florida subsp. polygaliphylla, also known as the Spanish broom, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a shrub that has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Genista florida subsp. polygaliphylla include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
